title: Saudi Arabia issues unified helpline '992' for expired visa queries of stranded visitors unable to exit amid regional crisis
summary_full: Saudi Arabia's passport directorate now offers a single helpline, 992, for visa status queries, especially for those expiring by February 25, 2026. This comes as a relief measure for stranded visitors, with an April 18, 2026 deadline for extensions or departure.  Act now to avoid penalties.
